project_name: Robust Federated Learning for Atrial Fibrillation Risk Prediction
medical_context: Prediction of AFib risk using 24-hour vital signs and lab values from ICU admissions.
architecture_explanation: Federated Learning simulation with 10 clients. 20.0% of clients execute a label-flipping poisoning attack. A Trimmed Mean aggregation algorithm defends against the poisoned updates.
